verses.en: The Lord is my shepherd, I shall not want.
verses.zh: 耶和华是我的牧者，我必不至缺乏。

verses.en: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil.
verses.zh: 我虽然行过死荫的幽谷，也不怕遭害。

verses.en: Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.
verses.zh: 你要专心仰赖耶和华，不可倚靠自己的聪明。

verses.en: Above all else, guard your heart, for everything you do flows from it.
verses.zh: 你要保守你心，胜过保守一切。
